title: Pig-to-Human Kidney Xenotransplantation Protocol
author: Fi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Repository for R code conducting comprehensive single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and computational analyses conducted on the xenografts and their contralateral untransplanted kidneys, as well as on the peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of pig-to-human kidney xeno-transplantation recipients
